MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-26-2023 Vacated

PLAINTIFF MAURISHA ALLEN'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER AND TO QUASH DEFENDANTS' SUBPOENAS FOR "ANY AND ALL" OF PLAINTIFF'S MEDICAL RECORDS, AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. (FOR TENTATIVE RULING ONLY, PART 2 OF 2)
Off Calendar Aug-18-2023 Off Calendar

Motion For Protective Order And To Quash Defendants' Subpoenas For "Any And All" Of Plaintiff"S Medical Records, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-18-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Toven Lim, Esq. 415-504-2165 Tobener Ravenscroft LLP for Plaintiff.
Rey Yang, Esq. 626-921-4300 Yang Professional Law Corporation for Defendants.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

ARGUED. Mr. Yang argues sanctions. Mr. Lim responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF MAURISHA ALLEN's Motion For Protective Order And To Quash Defendants' Subpoenas For "Any And All" Of Plaintiff'S Medical Records, And For Monetary Sanctions. (part 1 of 2)

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Sanctions are taken under submission.

Mr. Lim to submit a proposed form of order in word format to the Judge Pro Tem at rennepar85@gmail.com

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar May-03-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Courtcall:
Toven Lim, Esq. for Plaintiff.
Andrew Cho, Esq. for Defendants/Moving party.

There is no agreement. Parties may file motions for trial continuance to be heard in Dept. 206. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)
